title: 天皇賞（秋）の後に・自分を生きてこそ

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Yeahhhhh! Did ya see that?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
What a magnificent show from Vodka! Reckless
and unique! Truly striking!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
That's Vodka for you! This Umamusume has
remained steadfast in pursuing her own path and
has finally reached the top!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... Trainer! You've got somethin' to say to me, don't ya?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Don't ya?!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
You're damn right I am! I've done it! I've become
the coolest Umamusume!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
And you're the one who got me here! Hell
yeahhhhh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We hug each other so tightly that I can almost
hear ribs cracking over our shouts.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's supposed to be cool, but right now, she's
burning hot enough to set the Tokyo turf on fire.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And then... the awards ceremony.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Sup, it's Vodka! ...Well, all of Japan probably
knows that by now.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I won today! But winning isn't all I did. Two
important things happened today.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: What's she being so condescending for?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
First, I beat Daiwa Scarlet and took the Tenno
Sho!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
It's just not the same if I win when she's not
running. That's because...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Scarlet's the number one Umamusume! It's
because of her I could shine so brightly today.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Thanks, Scarlet!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Wh-what are you doing? Don't bring me into this,
you d-dummy!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
And the other important thing: I was able to win
today because I kept doin' things my own way!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
After all, that's the only way I know how to do
things.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Vodka reflects back on a few of the races she's
run...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Stayin' true to yourself isn't always so easy.
Sometimes ya break. Sometimes you're crushed.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Sometimes changin' yourself is an easy way to get
stronger. But...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
That's just boring! You need someone ya wanna
challenge even if winnin' seems impossible!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: And sometimes you do beat 'em! Ya might lose, but you might also win. And, you know what?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Winnin' that way is the absolute coolest! Take it
from me! I'm livin' proof!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
There might be Umamusume out there who're
stronger than me, but I'm the coolest!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Heh.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Follow my lead, everyone! Don't give up on
yourselves! Laugh when things are tough!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: I can't say what'll happen for sure. But!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: I can say that if ya live your own way, someone'll always be there to cheer ya on.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
You gotta grab glory together with them! ...Come
on up here, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: I wanna introduce ya guys to my partner!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Yeaaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Wh-what's up with those two? They look so
happy...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Hmph. Whatever! Ugh, I'm done with this!
Dummy!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Vodka pulls me up, puts her arm around my
shoulder, and gives me a big smile.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The ultimate sense of accomplishment that comes
with reaching the end of an uncharted
road—that's what Vodka obtained today.
